CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Jan-04-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing To Obtain Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:40:20 a.m., pausing at 09:52:12 a.m., and resuming at 09:57:06 a.m., and concluding at 10:00:59 a.m.

Plaintiff Erdal Tansev AKA Ed Tansev appearing represented by Michael Joseph Raifsnider, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jeff L. Handy not appearing.
Defendant Four P's Group, Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Four P's Group, LLC not appearing.

ED TANSEV is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and is examined by the Court.

The matter is submtted.
Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Erdal Tansev AKA Ed Tansev, and against Defendant Jeff L. Handy, Four P's Group, Inc., and Four P's Group, LLC as follows:

Damages: $51,500.00
Prejudgment Interest: $23,900.00
Costs: $868.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $76,268.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
